Package
Description
org.springframework.data.mongodb.core.convert
Spring Data MongoDB specific converter infrastructure.

    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    protected static class 
    MappingMongoConverter.DefaultConversionContext
    Conversion context holding references to simple MappingMongoConverter.DefaultConversionContext.ValueConverter and MappingMongoConverter.DefaultConversionContext.ContainerValueConverter.

    Method
    Description
    default MappingMongoConverter.ConversionContext

    Creates a new MappingMongoConverter.ConversionContext given ObjectPath.

    Create a new MappingMongoConverter.ConversionContext with currentPath applied.

    MappingMongoConverter.ConversionContext.convert(Object source, TypeInformation<? extends S> typeHint, MappingMongoConverter.ConversionContext context)

    MappingMongoConverter.DefaultConversionContext.convert(Object source, TypeInformation<? extends S> typeHint, MappingMongoConverter.ConversionContext context)
     
    protected @Nullable Object
    MappingMongoConverter.readCollectionOrArray(MappingMongoConverter.ConversionContext context, @Nullable Collection<?> source, TypeInformation<?> targetType)
    Reads the given Collection into a collection of the given TypeInformation.
    protected <S> S
    MappingMongoConverter.readDocument(MappingMongoConverter.ConversionContext context, @Nullable org.bson.conversions.Bson bson, TypeInformation<? extends S> typeHint)
    Conversion method to materialize an object from a document.
    protected @Nullable Map<Object,Object>
    MappingMongoConverter.readMap(MappingMongoConverter.ConversionContext context, @Nullable org.bson.conversions.Bson bson, TypeInformation<?> targetType)
    Reads the given Document into a Map. will recursively resolve nested Maps as well.
